body: This PR is a peel off from #1263, and builds ontop of #1269. It breaks off the Bretherton coefficients computations from the transforms.
title: Split Bretherton coefficients off from transforms

body: This PR is a peel off from #1263, it moves a bunch of functions into a utils module to ensure that we're not doing any closures over global variables.
title: Add igw utils module to ensure no closures
